/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/mathhunt.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mathhunt.dir/src/engine/renderwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mathhunt.dir/src/entities/entity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mathhunt.dir/src/utils/math.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mathhunt.dir/src/managers/TextureManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mathhunt.dir/src/engine/Game.cpp.o -o mathhunt  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libSDL2-2.0.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2_image/2.8.12_1/lib/libSDL2_image.dylib
